negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_013
prompt: The video opens with a close-up of a conveyor belt system, featuring a series of cylindrical rollers arranged in a row, set against a backdrop of a light-colored brick wall. The rollers are metallic and part of an industrial setup. A partially visible dark-colored object, likely part of a worker's clothing or machinery, occupies the left side of the frame. As the video progresses, a cardboard box labeled "10KG NET" appears, moving slowly along the conveyor belt with the cylindrical rollers spinning steadily throughout the video. The box contains tomatoes, which are visible through the cutouts on its sides. The box continues to move steadily, revealing more details of its labeling and the tomatoes inside. By the final frame, the box has moved further along the conveyor, with the tomatoes clearly visible and the label fully in view.  A medium shot captures the conveyor belt system, emphasizing the steady movement of the box and the spinning rollers. The background remains consistent, showcasing the industrial setting with the light-colored brick wall. The video maintains a documentary-style approach, focusing on the mechanical process and the contents of the box.
